needs_client_action.title: Provide updated family and team photos
needs_client_action.reason: Required to humanize the website and complete the 'localized' branding update started with the truck photos.

needs_client_action.reason: This has been on the list for two weeks; we need to know if the team is attending to coordinate logistics.

b3x_overdue.title: Service Titan integration for book funnel
Facebook Ad Campaign for IAQ Book

client_overdue.title: Provide updated family and team photos
client_overdue.action_needed: Sarah needs to send high-res family/team photos to Philip.

strategic_direction.title: Formalize 'Reporting' Service Layer
strategic_direction.reasoning: We are currently 'agreeing' to pull Service Titan correlation reports (a reporting-specific task) while the service is officially inactive. Moving this to an active service ensures consistent ROI tracking for the new IAQ funnel.

strategic_direction.title: Website Conversion Audit for $89 Tune-Up
strategic_direction.reasoning: With the $89 dual AC/furnace tune-up finalized as the April promo, we need to ensure the website landing pages are optimized specifically for this offer to maximize paid ad spend.

suggested_agenda.notes: Quickly celebrate the IAQ book completion and the truck photo updates.
Address the stale Orlando event status and the overdue Service Titan integration.
Confirm the switch from furnace to AC ads and the rollout of the 5-email drip.
Pitch the formalization of reporting and the Google Business Profile optimization.

projected_roadmap.title: Google Business Profile 'AC & IAQ' Optimization
projected_roadmap.what: Complete optimization of the GBP listing including updating services to prioritize AC repair/install, uploading the new truck photos, and posting 'seasonal offer' updates featuring the $89 tune-up.
projected_roadmap.why_now: Now that we've switched paid ads focus from furnaces to AC (per the March 10 meeting), our organic presence must match. This ensures a consistent message when users find Pearce HVAC via Google Maps.
projected_roadmap.effort_b3x: 3 hours to update services, posts, and localized images.
projected_roadmap.effort_client: 10 minutes to approve the seasonal post copy.
projected_roadmap.prerequisites: Capture and send localized truck photos (Done)
projected_roadmap.impact: Improves local map rankings for cooling-specific searches and increases click-through rates from local 'near me' queries.
projected_roadmap.pitch_script: Jim, now that the ads are fully focused on AC and the IAQ book, I’d like to mirror those updates on your Google Business Profile. Since we have those great new truck photos, we can use them to freshen up your local listing and make sure you're showing up top-of-mind for cooling repairs as the weather turns.

projected_roadmap.title: Service Titan Revenue Attribution Setup
projected_roadmap.what: A deep-dive integration project to map specific marketing campaign IDs from the IAQ book funnel and Facebook ads directly into Service Titan 'Marketing Items.'
projected_roadmap.why_now: We've already agreed to 'Pull Service Titan lead correlation report' manually. Automating this now prevents manual reporting lag and prepares the ground for activating the 'Reporting' service gap.
projected_roadmap.effort_b3x: 5 hours for Juan to map campaign sources and build the automated dashboard.
projected_roadmap.effort_client: Access to Service Titan admin settings and 30 minutes for a walkthrough of current source naming.
projected_roadmap.prerequisites: Service Titan integration for book funnel (In-progress)
projected_roadmap.impact: Provides 100% clarity on which ad dollars are turning into closed AC installs versus just 'hand-raisers.'
projected_roadmap.pitch_script: We're currently correlating your Service Titan leads manually, which works, but as we scale this IAQ funnel, we should automate the revenue attribution. If we link the campaigns directly, you'll be able to see exactly which Facebook ads are resulting in high-ticket AC replacements in real-time.

projected_roadmap.title: Heat-Map & User Behavior Audit on IAQ Landing Page
projected_roadmap.what: Installing Hotjar or similar tracking on the IAQ digital book landing page to analyze where users are dropping off or failing to submit the Service Titan form.
projected_roadmap.why_now: The landing page branding is done, but the 'Service Titan form connectivity' was a major topic in the March 17 meeting. We need data-driven insights to ensure the form isn't a friction point.
projected_roadmap.effort_b3x: 2 hours setup, 2 hours analysis after 500 visitors.
projected_roadmap.prerequisites: Update branding on IAQ landing pages (Done)
projected_roadmap.impact: Identifies conversion killers on the new funnel, potentially doubling the number of digital book downloads without increasing ad spend.
projected_roadmap.pitch_script: The IAQ book landing page looks great with the new branding, but I want to make sure it's actually converting at the highest rate possible. I'd like to run a behavior audit to see exactly where people are clicking—or getting stuck—on that Service Titan form so we can squeeze every lead possible out of the traffic we're paying for.

talking_points.Review and approve March Raise-Hand emai: Jim, thanks for getting those March Raise-Hand emails approved—they're out and performing well.
talking_points.Switch ad focus from furnaces to AC: Philip is finishing the shift in our ad spend from heating to cooling this week to stay ahead of the spring rush.
talking_points.Confirm availability for Orlando event: I wanted to flag the Orlando event—it's been on our radar for a few weeks, do you have a verdict on if you're attending?
talking_points.Provide updated family and team photos: Sarah, once you get a chance to send those family and team photos over, we can finalize the localized look on the homepage.
talking_points.Service Titan integration for book funne: Juan is still finalizing the Service Titan connectivity for the book funnel—we're a few days behind on that but should have it live shortly.
talking_points.Google Business Profile 'AC & IAQ' Optim: Since we've shifted the ads to AC, I'd like to optimize your Google Business Profile to match—it's a quick win to help your local map rankings.
talking_points.Service Titan Revenue Attribution Setup: Now that we're pulling manual reports, it might make sense to automate the revenue attribution in Service Titan so you can see exactly which ads are closing deals.
